description: You are a backend engineer working on a distributed key-value store at `/home/ga/PycharmProjects/raft_kv`. The consensus module (`raft_kv`) implements the Raft consensus algorithm, but the cluster is currently unstable due to logic bugs in `raft/consensus.py`. Fix the implementation to resolve split vote loops, nodes voting for candidates with older terms, and candidates failing to step down when a valid leader sends a heartbeat. All tests in the `tests/` directory must pass. Do not modify the test files.
